calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-29-2026 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Jan-16-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505 - Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:35am and concluding at 10:56am.

Plaintiff Toracca Properties, L.P. appearing represented by David Wasserman, Esq.
Defendants Evelyn Balistreri and Frankie Gaetano Balistreri not appearing.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.

Court examines Plaintiff GIOVANI TORACCA General Manager and he confirms statements made by counsel.

The matter is submitted.

Based on the documents filed, the statement made by Plaintiff and its Counsel, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Toracca Properties LP, and against Defendant Evelyn Balistreri and Frankie Gaetano Balistreri, as follows:

Damages: $15,560.00
Prejudgment Interest: $0
Attorney Fees: $1,190.00
Costs: $980.00

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $17,770.00

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date.

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Jan-07-2026 Continued To Jan-16-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505 - Matter Not Reported

Plaintiff Toracca Properties, L.P. appearing represented by Shoshana Raphael, Esq. via zoom.
Defendant Evelyn Balisteri and Franki Gaetano Balistreri not appearing.

This department did not receive any courtesy copies prior this hearing.

The court continues this matter to Januray 16, 2026 at 9:00am in dept. 505 to allow counsel an oppertunity to provide this department courtesy copies of the relevant documents for Judge Tong's review.

Off Calendar Sep-29-2025 Continued To Feb-25-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Off Calendar Jul-28-2025 Continued To Oct-22-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
